name: InstaReM Asia Cross-Border Payment API
what_it_does: InstaReM (Nium's consumer and SMB brand) cross-border payment REST API for businesses and individuals to send international money transfers across 60+ countries with competitive exchange rates, same-day or next-day delivery, and strong coverage of Asia-Pacific corridors (Singapore, Australia, India, Southeast Asia, Japan), backed by Nium's global payment infrastructure. Enables AI agents to manage international transfer initiation for cross-border payment automation, handle FX rate quote for exchange rate transparency automation, access recipient bank account management for transfer recipient automation, retrieve transfer status tracking for payment delivery automation, manage compliance verification for AML transfer automation, handle delivery method selection for bank/wallet disbursement automation, access corridor availability for supported country-pair automation, retrieve fee calculation for transfer cost automation, manage transfer cancellation for payment reversal automation, and integrate InstaReM with SMB, marketplace, and payroll platforms for end-to-end Asia-Pacific cross-border payment automation.
use_cases: Sending business payments to Asia-Pacific suppliers from SMB treasury agents
Processing payroll transfers to Singapore and Australia from payroll agents
Remitting funds to India and Southeast Asia from diaspora payment agents
Checking competitive FX rates for APAC corridors from transfer comparison agents
not_for: High-volume enterprise FX treasury (use Nium directly or Airwallex for enterprise scale)
Consumer-to-consumer remittance at scale (InstaReM API is SMB/business focused)
Non-Asia corridors as primary use (InstaReM is strongest for APAC)
best_when: An SMB or financial institution wanting AI agents to automate cross-border payments and FX transfers for Asia-Pacific corridors through InstaReM's competitive rate platform backed by Nium's infrastructure.
avoid_when: SAME INFRASTRUCTURE AS NIUM — CONSIDER DIRECT: InstaReM uses Nium infrastructure; automated high-volume enterprise integration may benefit from direct Nium API; automated InstaReM for very high volume creates sub-optimal pricing vs direct Nium relationship. FX RATE QUOTE VALIDITY IS SHORT: InstaReM FX rate quote expires within 30-60 seconds; automated transfer must use quoteId before expiry; automated delayed transfer execution creates expired_quote and need for fresh quote. KYC REQUIRED FOR TRANSFERS ABOVE THRESHOLD: InstaReM requires KYC verification for transfers above regulatory thresholds; automated transfer for unverified user above threshold creates kyc_verification_required block. SINGAPORE MAS LIMITS APPLY: InstaReM Singapore operations apply MAS transaction limits; automated transfer must comply with MAS-set limits per transaction and per day; automated over-limit transfer creates limit_exceeded rejection.

auth.notes: InstaReM uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Singapore HQ. Founded 2014 by Prajit Nanu (also Nium co-founder). Part of Nium group. Products: Consumer/SMB remittance, business payments, FX, multi-currency accounts. No public SDK. MAS-licensed Singapore. ASIC-licensed Australia. FCA UK. 60+ countries. 5M+ customers. SMB and consumer brand of Nium infrastructure. Competes with Wise and Airwallex for Asia SMB payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access requires business account; no free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transfer fees: typically 0.25-0.5% FX spread + flat fee per transfer; competitive for APAC corridors
pricing.notes: Singapore. Nium subsidiary. MAS/ASIC/FCA licensed. Per-transfer pricing. Business account required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; transfer and quote APIs throttled; webhooks for transfer status events

known_agent_gotchas: QUOTE THEN TRANSFER FLOW: InstaReM requires FX quote before transfer creation; automated transfer must first get quote then create transfer with quoteId; automated transfer without prior quote creates missing_quote_id error

FX QUOTE EXPIRES IN ~60 SECONDS: InstaReM rate quote validity is short (often 30-60 seconds); automated transfer pipeline must minimize delay between quote and transfer creation; automated slow pipeline creates expired_quote requiring re-quote at potentially different rate

KYC VERIFICATION GATES LARGE TRANSFERS: InstaReM requires KYC for transfers above SGD/AUD regulatory thresholds; automated transfer must check verification status before large transfers; automated transfer for unverified user above threshold creates identity_verification_required block

RECIPIENT IFSC REQUIRED FOR INDIA: InstaReM India transfers require recipient IFSC (bank branch code) in addition to account number; automated India payout must include IFSC; automated account-number-only India transfer creates missing_ifsc_code error

WEBHOOK STATUS ORDER NOT GUARANTEED: InstaReM webhook delivery order for status updates not guaranteed; automated workflow must handle out-of-order status events; automated strict state machine without deduplication creates state conflicts from redelivered or out-of-order webhooks
agent_readiness.security_notes: Asia cross-border payments. MAS, ASIC, FCA. OAuth2. SG/AU. Financial transfer and identity data.

security_score_components.security_notes: APAC payments. MAS, ASIC, FCA. OAuth2. SG/AU. Financial transfer and identity data.
